title: This Love
why_this_song: This Love by Maroon 5 (2002) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Whispered goodbye as she got on a plane"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Never to return again but always in my heart, oh"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "She said goodbye too many times before"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "She said goodbye too many times before"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "This love has taken its toll on me"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "goodbye" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "goodbye" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "heart" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "heart" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I was so high, I did not recognize
So hard to keep her satisfied, oh
Her heart is breakin' in front of me

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: The fire burning in her eyes
She said goodbye too many times before

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "This Love" was released in 2002. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "This Love" foi lançada em 2002. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "This Love" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "This Love" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
